input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.1.1
            TITLE: the primary structure must be constructed from one or a combination of the following:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.1.1: The Primary Structure must be constructed from one or a combination of the following:
F.5.1.1 The Primary Structure must be constructed from one or a combination of the following: 
• Steel Tubing and Material  F.3.2   F.3.4 
• Alternative Tubing Materials F.3.2 F.3.5 
• Composite Material  F.4

final_answer: The Primary Structure must be constructed from one or a combination of the following: • Steel Tubing and Material F.3.2 F.3.4 • Alternative Tubing Materials F.3.2 F.3.5 • Composite Material F.4
